description_long: This airplane features a dramatic, angular design with a wide, swept-back wingspan and a dark, metallic exterior accented by deep red panels. The wings are sharply tapered and extend outward with a slight downward anhedral angle, ending in upturned winglets. The central fuselage is compact and robust, with visible engine nacelles mounted beneath the wings and a cockpit area positioned at the front. The tail section is split into two vertical stabilizers, forming an H-tail configuration, and the undercarriage appears streamlined with no visible landing gear extended. The overall appearance suggests a futuristic or military-inspired aircraft, built for speed and maneuverability.
description: A sleek, angular airplane with swept-back wings, dark metallic surfaces, and red accents, featuring twin vertical stabilizers and a compact forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, swept-back wings and the pointed nose with the cockpit at the center, highlighting the aggressive stance and wingtip angles.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin, angular profile, the underwing engine nacelle, and the split tail stabilizers, emphasizing the aircraft's streamlined body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin vertical stabilizers and the full wingspan, with the engines and tail structure clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same underwing engine and tail configuration, with the red and black color scheme prominent.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with pronounced anhedral angle and upturned winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear (not visible in current views).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy.
